title: The Threnodies Composed for 'Uthman
description: After his murder the poets spoke about him-some in praise, some in derision, some in tearful lamentation, some in gleeful joy. Those who lauded him included Hassan b. Thabit al-Angari, Ka'b b. Malik al-An^ari, and Tamim b. Ubayy b. Muqbil, as well as others.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 15
